settings.heading: Wholesale catalog reference
settings.intro: Browse this product category as a B2B reference, then send quantity, ZIP code, timeline, budget, and acceptable substitutions for quote review.
settings.body: Availability, case-pack options, and wholesale pricing may depend on quantity, supplier conditions, and destination. For faster review, send product names, estimated quantity, delivery ZIP code, budget range, and timeline.

settings.heading: Not sure what to choose? Start with a purchasing pathway.
settings.intro: These pathways help clarify whether you are buying for a classroom, studio, resale program, or creative project.

settings.heading: Request pricing for this category.
settings.intro: Tell us which product line you are reviewing, expected quantity, destination ZIP code, budget range, and timeline.

settings.heading: Before you request catalog pricing.
settings.intro: A few notes that help set expectations for catalog availability, custom sourcing, and B2B quoting.

settings.heading: Need policy, lead time, or sourcing details?
settings.intro: Review supporting B2B pages before sending a catalog inquiry.

settings.heading: How to use this catalog category
settings.intro: Use the products here as references for your purchasing brief. Exact pricing and lead time depend on quantity, case pack, destination, and supplier availability.

settings.heading: Need a different category or custom kit?
settings.intro: Move from this category into custom sourcing, school kits, or another product line if the listed catalog does not match the full request.

settings.heading: Turn catalog browsing into a useful bulk request.
settings.intro: After reviewing products, send item names, quantities, delivery ZIP code, timeline, and acceptable substitutes so we can review practical B2B options.

settings.heading: A better catalog request includes more than a product link.
settings.intro: For B2B review, include quantity, delivery destination, timing, use case, and whether alternative products are acceptable.
